name: mdx-relay
description: Review and publish Obsidian notes as repository-ready MDX.

scripts.test:bundle: npm run build && node esbuild.config.mjs probe-node-builtins && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const root='dist'; if(!fs.existsSync(path.join(root,'main.js'))) throw new Error('dist/main.js is missing'); const walk=d=>fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true}).flatMap(e=>e.isDirectory()?walk(path.join(d,e.name)):[path.join(d,e.name)]); const native=walk(root).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.node')); if(native.length) throw new Error('native .node files: '+native.join(', ')); console.log('bundle: dist/main.js present; 0 native .node files');"
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:integration && npm run test:bundle
